overview: Wejha (وجهة) is a Tunisian mobile-first platform connecting people with mobility restrictions (PMR), student helpers, and PMR-certified taxi drivers. With inclusive accessibility design, gamification for students, and real-time booking and tracking, Wejha makes mobility and daily assistance accessible to everyone — "Ensemble, sans frontières."
features: Role-based flows for PMR users, student helpers, and drivers
Accessible UI: high-contrast mode, adjustable text size, large touch targets
Gamification for students: Bronze/Silver/Gold badge system with points and missions
Real-time booking status tracking (Requested → Confirmed → En Route → Arrived → Completed)
Verified profile badges with trust scores and 5-star reviews
PMR Premium subscription: priority access and dedicated provider
Family mode: manage bookings on behalf of a loved one
